title: Pulling an All-Nighter to Meet a Deadline

all.en: The client demanded the proposal by nine in the morning, leaving us only one night.
all.zh: 客戶要求早上九點前交出提案，留給我們只有一個晚上。

all.en: We ordered three large pizzas and a dozen cans of coffee to keep going.
all.zh: 我們訂了三個大披薩和一打罐裝咖啡，好讓自己撐下去。

all.en: By midnight, our eyes were red and our jokes were getting strangely funny.
all.zh: 到了午夜，我們眼睛都紅了，講出來的笑話也變得莫名其妙地好笑。

all.en: My colleague kept yawning while editing the financial figures on her laptop.
all.zh: 我的同事一邊在筆電上修改財務數字，一邊不停打哈欠。

all.en: I was responsible for the design slides, which seemed to multiply on their own.
all.zh: 我負責的是設計簡報，那些投影片好像會自己增加。

all.en: At three in the morning, the printer jammed and we nearly lost our minds.
all.zh: 凌晨三點，印表機卡紙，我們差點崩潰。

all.en: We took turns napping for twenty minutes on the office couch.
all.zh: 我們輪流在辦公室沙發上小睡二十分鐘。

all.en: As sunrise lit the window, we finally completed the final version.
all.zh: 當日出的光線照進窗戶時，我們終於完成了最終版本。

all.en: We printed five clean copies and bound them neatly for the meeting.
all.zh: 我們列印了五份乾淨的副本，整齊地裝訂好以備會議使用。

all.en: The client smiled at the result and even praised our creative concept.
all.zh: 客戶對成果露出笑容，甚至稱讚了我們的創意構想。

all.en: We celebrated with breakfast, then went straight home to sleep until evening.
all.zh: 我們以早餐慶祝，然後直接回家一覺睡到傍晚。
